title: Automatic animal feeding system for rotating disposal compartment components
abstract: An automatic animal feeding system is provided. Embodiments of the automatic animal feeding system include an automatic food dispenser and a food canister storing food pods. The automatic food dispenser couples to the food canister, receives a food pod form the food canister, removes a cover or lid from the food pod, presents the opened food pod for pet consumption, disposes of the food pod into a disposal compartment that is sealed off from the ambient air, and implements other steps of an automatic feeding process. Aspects of the automatic feeding process can be efficiently implemented, for example, by actuating two motors based on data received from sensors of the automatic animal feeding system. Accordingly, embodiments of the present disclosure provide a compact, control-efficient, self-cleaning automatic animal feeding system that can continuously personalize feeding patterns or feed a pet with little to no human intervention over a period of time.
claims: 1. An automatic pet feed system that implements an automatic feeding process, the automatic pet feed system comprising: a base having a center point; a stationary plate comprising a disposal port; a plurality of pod chambers positioned on the base and below the stationary plate, wherein the plurality of pod chambers are configured to receive a respective used food pod via the disposal port, wherein each pod chamber of the plurality of pod chambers and the disposal port of the stationary plate are radially equidistant from the center point of the base; a base rotation motor coupled to the base and actuatable, based on a sensor signal, to cause rotation of the plurality of pod chambers; and an enclosure at least partially enclosing the base, the stationary plate, the plurality of pod chambers, and the base rotation motor, wherein the enclosure comprises an opening defining a feeding port, wherein the rotation of the plurality of pod chambers causes a first pod chamber of the plurality of pod chambers to transition from not vertically aligning with the disposal port to vertically aligning with the disposal port.
